project_positioning: Production-simulated experimentation, metrics intelligence, and decision-audit platform.
resume_bullet_candidate: Built MetaSignal, a production-simulated experimentation intelligence platform with versioned metric registry, denominator-conflict detection, data-quality gates, deterministic assignment, SRM checks, CUPED readouts, A/A validation, guardrail-first decisioning, right-censoring, anomaly detection, golden scenarios, and auditable evidence artifacts.

signals.proof: Versioned metric definitions with explicit numerator, denominator, grain, owner, and guardrail fields.
signals.interview_signal: Can explain why conversion-rate denominator inconsistency breaks experimentation decisions.

signals.proof: Reusable quality service and failure-injection scenarios create blocked/warn/pass evidence.
signals.interview_signal: Understands that serving no metric is better than serving a metric computed on bad data.

signals.proof: Detector identifies active metrics with conflicting denominator logic.
signals.interview_signal: Can reason about metric governance, not just dashboards.

signals.proof: Hash-based assignment creates 20k users and SRM check validates treatment/control balance.
signals.interview_signal: Can defend assignment validity and sample-ratio mismatch checks.

signals.proof: CUPED readout stores lift, p-value, variance reduction, and evaluation artifact.
signals.interview_signal: Can explain variance reduction and pre-period covariate adjustment.

signals.proof: 1000 synthetic A/A runs validate false-positive control and p-value uniformity.
signals.interview_signal: Can show the statistical method was validated, not merely implemented.

signals.proof: Positive primary metric is blocked because refund guardrail breaches tolerance.
signals.interview_signal: Can reason about asymmetric product harm and why guardrails are gates.

signals.proof: Post-launch validation marks delayed refund guardrail as immature/right-censored.
signals.interview_signal: Can explain why early readouts can be invalid for delayed metrics.

signals.proof: DOW-adjusted rolling baseline detects labeled synthetic metric anomaly.
signals.interview_signal: Can distinguish metric movement from seasonality/noise/data-quality failure.

signals.proof: Deterministic scenario suite validates registry, quality, assignment, CUPED, guardrail, and audit behavior.
signals.interview_signal: Can prove system behavior through repeatable tests.
